whatIs.title: What is
whatIs.description: Be a Lucky Block is a Roblox simulator where distance increases luck, the trip home increases danger, and Brainrots become the base economy that keeps paying while you are offline.

features.title: Distance-Based Luck
features.description: Farther destinations improve your reward ceiling, but every extra step makes the return more dangerous.

features.title: Brainrot Economy
features.description: Brainrots matter because they turn a successful run into passive income you keep after logging off.

features.title: Escape-Focused Loop
features.description: A run is not finished when the block rolls well. It only counts after you get the pull back to base.

faq.title: Be a Lucky Block
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for new and returning Be a Lucky Block players

questions.question: How often does Be a Lucky Block update?
questions.answer: Be a Lucky Block advertises a weekly Saturday update rhythm, so that is the main day to watch for fresh changes.

questions.question: What does the RELEASE code give in Be a Lucky Block?
questions.answer: The current starter code covered on the homepage is RELEASE, and it gives Brr Brr Patapim.

questions.question: Why do farther destinations matter in Be a Lucky Block?
questions.answer: Farther destinations improve luck in Be a Lucky Block, which raises your ceiling for stronger pulls if you can survive the return.

questions.question: Why are Brainrots important in Be a Lucky Block?
questions.answer: Brainrots are important in Be a Lucky Block because they become the core of your base economy and keep earning cash offline.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in Be a Lucky Block?
questions.answer: Open Be a Lucky Block, go to the Shop menu, open the Codes area, paste the code, and press Verify.

questions.question: When should I start trading in Be a Lucky Block?
questions.answer: Start trading in Be a Lucky Block after your base income is already stable, not while one pull still controls your whole progression.

questions.question: Where should I track Be a Lucky Block updates first?
questions.answer: Track Be a Lucky Block updates through the official Discord, Roblox event pages, the Roblox game page, and the studio X account.
